sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63555" key="lipo/sarc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπό-σαρξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">σαρκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.106</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
